top_signals.title: Japanese officials visit Russia to discuss business environment amid war
top_signals.summary: Economic cooperation between the two countries has significantly stalled since the start of the Russian invasion of Ukraine in 2022.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: FBI warns extortion hackers are visiting US law firms to steal data
top_signals.summary: In a public advisory issued Tuesday the FBI said a hacking group has targeted law firms using social engineering schemes to gain remote access to corporate systems and exfiltrate data.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Chinese Coal Disaster to Ripple Through Steel, Power, Chemicals
top_signals.summary: The Shanxi coal disaster is likely to hit Chinese output in the short term, raising costs for steelmakers, power plants and chemicals manufacturers.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.summary: IREN climbed within 10% of a fresh all-time high after unveiling another major AI infrastructure expansion tied to Dell.
